summary_hi: असंगठित क्षेत्र के मज़दूरों के लिए राष्ट्रीय पहचान पत्र। 2 लाख रुपये का दुर्घटना बीमा मुफ़्त।

rules.reason_hi: e-Shram ke liye umar 16 se 59 saal ke beech honi chahiye
e-Shram registration ke liye Aadhaar card aur Aadhaar se juda mobile zaroori hai
rules.ask_hi: Kya aapke paas Aadhaar card hai?

rules.reason_hi: e-Shram ke liye bank account aur IFSC zaroori hai
Sarkari karmchari, EPFO ya ESIC member e-Shram mein register nahin ho sakte

chunks.text: e-Shram is the national database for India's unorganised workers, launched in August 2021. Each registered worker gets a unique 12-digit Universal Account Number (UAN) printed on an e-Shram card, valid lifetime. Registration is free and online. Provides free accidental insurance cover of ₹2 lakh (death/permanent disability) and ₹1 lakh (partial disability) under PMSBY for the first year. Asangathit kshetra ke mazdooron ke liye rashtriya database, UAN number aur 2 lakh tak ka mufat durghatna bima.

e-Shram eligibility: Any worker in India aged 16-59 years engaged in the unorganised sector — construction labour, domestic worker, street vendor, agricultural labour, MGNREGA worker, fisher, beedi roller, head-loader, brick-kiln worker, rickshaw puller, plumber, electrician, mason, gig and platform worker, etc. Not eligible if you are an EPFO/ESIC/NPS member, government employee, or an income-tax payer. Patrata: umar 16 se 59 saal, asangathit kshetra ka mazdoor ho, EPFO/ESIC ya sarkari naukri mein na ho, income tax na bharta ho.

Benefits of e-Shram registration: (1) Universal Account Number (UAN) — a portable lifetime worker ID. (2) ₹2 lakh accidental death insurance and ₹1 lakh partial disability cover (PMSBY) free for one year. (3) Future eligibility for centrally-targeted social-security schemes via the database. (4) Helps in identification during disasters and pandemics for direct benefit transfers. Faayda: lifetime UAN, 2 lakh tak mufat durghatna bima, aagey sarkari yojanaon ka labh seedha milta hai.

Documents required for e-Shram registration: (1) Aadhaar card. (2) Mobile number linked to Aadhaar (for OTP). (3) Active bank account number with IFSC code. That's it — no other paperwork. Kagazaat: Aadhaar card, Aadhaar se juda mobile number, bank account number aur IFSC code. Aur kuch chahiye nahin.

How to register on e-Shram: Self-registration is FREE. (1) Visit eshram.gov.in, click 'Register on e-Shram'. (2) Enter Aadhaar-linked mobile number, verify OTP. (3) Fill personal details, occupation, address, bank account, nominee. (4) Submit — e-Shram card with UAN is downloaded instantly. Alternatively visit any Common Service Centre (CSC) free of charge. Kaise apply karein: eshram.gov.in par jayein, Aadhaar-linked mobile se OTP verify karein, details bharein, e-Shram card download karein. Yaa nazdeeki CSC jayein - dono jagah mufat hai.

Update e-Shram details: Log in to eshram.gov.in with UAN + OTP to update mobile, address, occupation, bank, or nominee. Changes are free. If you join EPFO/ESIC later, your e-Shram registration is automatically de-activated. e-Shram card details mein badlav karna ho to website par UAN aur OTP ke saath login karein. Agar baad mein EPFO ya ESIC mein register ho jayein to e-Shram apne aap band ho jata hai.

e-Shram helpline: National toll-free 14434, 8.00 AM – 8.00 PM, in Hindi, English and 11 other Indian languages. Website: eshram.gov.in. Email: eshram-care@gov.in. Madad ke liye 14434 par call karein, ye Hindi mein bhi available hai.
